# scaffolding_example (Resource)

Example resource in the Terraform provider scaffolding.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "scaffolding_example" "example" {
  name        = "my-example"
  description = "This is an example resource"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the example resource.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the example resource.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
terraform import scaffolding_example.example example-id
